description: 🥳 Our link-o-loon balloons feature a special tail design for easy linking and shaping. Perfect for arches, garlands, columns, and fun balloon structures at birthday, baby shower, wedding, graduation, and themed party. Fast to set up, fun to style! ⭐ Assembly steps: 💕Take out the link balloons and check whether it is intact. 💕Use an air pump or a manual inflator to inflate the latex balloon. 💕Connect the balloon tails to the knot or tail of another balloon. 💕Continue to connect more balloons through the tail to form a balloon chain garland, and adjust the position to achieve the desired effect. 💕Balloon decorations of different colors and shapes can be added as needed, or they can be combined into other balloon shapes. 💕When completed, the linking balloon can be hung on the ceiling, wall or designated location. ⭐Balloon inflation and storage: ☞It is recommended to inflate to 80%-92% to avoid bursting. ☞Use packaging bags when storing to prevent dust and damage. ☞Store in a dry place to prevent moisture from affecting the quality of the balloon. ⭐Safety reminder: 🚫Please avoid use if you are allergic to latex. 🚫Children need adult supervision when using. 🚫Avoid exposing balloons to high temperatures, open flames, strong light, or near sharp objects.
